scene.description: An outcome the Archive built, evaluated, and declined to keep. River Street, but reconstructed all the way through — including the cause that's missing everywhere else.

fragments.label: The Cause, Restored
fragments.symbol: Here, the central event is present. You can almost read what it was before Eden's layer files the edges off it as you look.

fragments.label: The Rejection Note
fragments.text: Eden's annotation: 'Outcome coherent. Outcome destabilizing. Discard.' The truest version was thrown away for being true in the wrong way.

fragments.label: Your Signature
fragments.text: The rejection was countersigned. By a Keeper. The handwriting is yours, dated before you remember starting.

interpretations.label: Demand the rejected outcome be restored
